gaps: No test case covers the User Guides section under App Settings at all
No test case covers device image loading behavior in any list/scrolling context
No test case covers lazy loading or pagination of device assets (images loading only for first N items)
No test case covers scrolling behavior in the User Guides device list
No test case covers placeholder/fallback UI for missing or failed image loads
No test case covers the User Guides section's device list population logic
No test case covers memory or resource constraints when loading multiple device images in a scrollable list

generated_testcases.title: TC-UG-001: Verify User Guides section displays device list and loads images for first 6 devices
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app
Tap App Settings (gear icon)
Scroll down and tap 'User Guides'
Observe the device list displayed
Verify that at least 6 device entries are visible in the list
For each of the first 6 devices, verify that a device image/thumbnail is displayed next to the device name
Tap on one of the first 6 device entries
Verify that the corresponding user guide PDF or web page loads correctly
generated_testcases.expected: User Guides section shows a scrollable list of devices. The first 6 devices each display a valid device image (not a placeholder/icon). Tapping a device entry loads the correct user guide.

generated_testcases.title: TC-UG-002: Verify device images load correctly when scrolling beyond the first 6 devices in User Guides
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app
Tap App Settings (gear icon)
Scroll down and tap 'User Guides'
Observe the initial device list
Scroll down slowly through the entire device list until all devices are visible
For each device entry beyond the first 6 (e.g., 7th, 8th, 9th...), visually inspect the device image/thumbnail
Scroll back up to the top of the list
Verify that the first 6 device images are still displayed correctly
generated_testcases.expected: All device entries in the User Guides list, including those beyond the first 6, display valid device images. No placeholder icons, broken image symbols, or blank spaces appear for any device. Scrolling back up does not cause previously loaded images to disappear.

generated_testcases.title: TC-UG-003: Verify placeholder/fallback UI appears when a device image fails to load in User Guides
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app
Tap App Settings (gear icon)
Scroll down and tap 'User Guides'
Scroll down to a device entry beyond the first 6 that may have a missing image
If a device image fails to load, observe the fallback UI displayed
Verify that a placeholder icon (e.g., generic headset/speakerphone icon or device silhouette) is shown instead of a broken image
Verify that the device name text is still displayed correctly next to the placeholder
Tap the device entry with the placeholder
Verify that the user guide still loads correctly despite the missing image
generated_testcases.expected: When a device image fails to load, a placeholder/fallback icon is displayed instead of a broken image symbol. The device name remains visible and tappable. The user guide content loads correctly regardless of image load failure.

generated_testcases.title: TC-UG-004: Verify User Guides device list population includes all compatible Poly devices
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app
Tap App Settings (gear icon)
Scroll down and tap 'User Guides'
Obtain the full list of device entries displayed

Cross-reference the displayed device list with the list of all Poly devices compatible with the Poly Studio Mobile app (e.g., Voyager Free 60+ UC, Voyager 5200, Voyager 4320, Voyager 4220, Voyager 6200, Voyager 8200, Voyager Focus 2, Blackwire 8225, Blackwire 7225, Savi 8220, Calisto 7200, Calisto 5300, Sync 20, Sync 40, Sync 60)
Verify that every compatible device model appears in the User Guides list
Verify that no duplicate entries exist
Verify that no non-Poly or unrelated devices appear in the list
generated_testcases.expected: The User Guides section displays a complete list of all Poly devices compatible with the app. No devices are missing from the list, no duplicates exist, and no unrelated devices are shown.

generated_testcases.title: TC-UG-005: Verify device images load correctly after app restart and re-scroll in User Guides
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app
Tap App Settings (gear icon)
Scroll down and tap 'User Guides'
Scroll down to the bottom of the device list to trigger lazy loading of all device images
Scroll back to the top and verify the first 6 device images are displayed
Press the Home button to background the app
Reopen Poly Studio Mobile app from the recent apps list
Navigate back to App Settings → User Guides
Scroll down to the bottom of the device list again
Scroll back up and verify all device images (including those beyond the first 6) are displayed correctly
generated_testcases.expected: After app backgrounding and return, all device images in the User Guides list load correctly. No images are replaced by placeholders or broken icons after the app lifecycle transition.

generated_testcases.title: TC-UG-006: Verify device images load correctly after Bluetooth disconnect/reconnect cycle
steps: Connect a Poly device (e.g., Voyager Free 60+ UC) to the phone via Bluetooth
Open Poly Studio Mobile app
Tap App Settings (gear icon)
Scroll down and tap 'User Guides'
Scroll through the device list and verify images load for all devices
Disconnect the Bluetooth connection from the phone's Bluetooth settings
Wait 5 seconds
Reconnect the Bluetooth device
Reopen Poly Studio Mobile app
Navigate to App Settings → User Guides
Scroll through the entire device list
Verify that all device images load correctly, including devices beyond the first 6
generated_testcases.expected: Device images in the User Guides list load correctly after a Bluetooth disconnect/reconnect cycle. No images fail to load or show placeholders due to the Bluetooth state change.

generated_testcases.title: TC-UG-007: Verify device images load correctly under low memory/constrained conditions
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app
Tap App Settings (gear icon)
Scroll down and tap 'User Guides'
Scroll rapidly up and down the entire device list multiple times (at least 5 full scroll cycles)
While scrolling, observe if any device images fail to load or revert to placeholders
Open several other resource-intensive apps (e.g., Chrome, YouTube, Camera) to trigger memory pressure
Switch back to Poly Studio Mobile app
Navigate to App Settings → User Guides
Scroll through the device list again
Verify that all device images are displayed correctly, including those beyond the first 6
generated_testcases.expected: Under memory pressure and rapid scrolling, all device images in the User Guides list load correctly. No images show placeholders, broken icons, or fail to load due to resource constraints. The app does not crash or become unresponsive.

generated_testcases.title: TC-UG-008: Verify device images persist after orientation change while in User Guides
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app
Tap App Settings (gear icon)
Scroll down and tap 'User Guides'
Scroll down to a position where devices beyond the first 6 are visible
Rotate the phone to landscape orientation
Verify that the device list and images re-render correctly in landscape
Scroll through the list and verify all device images are displayed
Rotate the phone back to portrait orientation
Verify that the device list and images re-render correctly in portrait
Verify that the scroll position is approximately maintained
Verify that all device images (including those beyond the first 6) are still displayed correctly
generated_testcases.expected: After orientation changes, all device images in the User Guides list load and display correctly in both portrait and landscape orientations. The scroll position is maintained. No images show placeholders or fail to load after config change.

generated_testcases.title: TC-UG-009: Verify User Guides section handles rapid tapping on multiple device entries
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app
Tap App Settings (gear icon)
Scroll down and tap 'User Guides'
Rapidly tap on 3-4 different device entries in quick succession (within 2 seconds)
Observe the app behavior
Verify that the app does not crash
Verify that the last tapped device's user guide loads correctly
Navigate back to User Guides list
Verify that all device images in the list are still displayed correctly
generated_testcases.expected: Rapid tapping on multiple device entries does not crash the app. The last tapped device's user guide loads correctly. Returning to the list shows all device images intact.

generated_testcases.title: TC-UG-010: Verify device images load correctly when User Guides is accessed without any Poly device connected
steps: Ensure no Poly Bluetooth device is connected to the phone
Open Poly Studio Mobile app
Tap App Settings (gear icon)
Scroll down and tap 'User Guides'
Observe the device list
Scroll through the entire list
Verify that all device entries display device images correctly (including beyond the first 6)
Tap on any device entry
Verify that the user guide loads correctly
generated_testcases.expected: The User Guides section displays the full device list with all images loading correctly even when no Poly device is connected. All device images load for devices beyond the first 6. User guides are accessible without a connected device.
